name: SuperPawn Auto
description_short: Superpawn Inc is a pawn shop in Oklahoma City offering collateral-based loans, merchandise sales, and buying services across jewelry, tools, firearms, and sporting goods.
description_long:
Superpawn Inc operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 927 SE 59th St in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma. The business has established itself within the local community by offering pawn loans and retail merchandise across multiple product categories. According to aggregated customer feedback, the shop has built a reputation for transparency in transactions and fair dealing with customers seeking quick access to cash through collateral-based lending.

The company offers pawn loans where customers can use personal items as collateral, along with the option to buy and sell merchandise outright. Their inventory spans tools, jewelry, firearms, sporting goods, and vintage/consignment items. The business operates extended hours Monday through Friday (9 AM–7 PM) and Saturday (9 AM–5 PM), providing accessibility for working customers. Their phone number is listed as +140-563-15525.

Superpawn differentiates itself through staff described as friendly and approachable during transactions, with customers highlighting the company's effort to explain loan terms and item conditions clearly. The pricing is characterized as competitive and fair relative to similar pawn operations. The variety of inventory—particularly tools and jewelry—is frequently commended as a strength, suggesting successful sourcing and merchandising practices.

However, the business experiences operational inconsistencies. Customer feedback reveals occasional delays in service (particularly with firearm transfers and return calls), variable staff professionalism (ranging from courteous to dismissive), and isolated quality control issues (such as ammunition not being properly inspected). The company's business verification status remains incomplete on the directory listing. These factors suggest Superpawn operates competently for routine pawn transactions but may encounter friction on complex or time-sensitive requests.
pros: Friendly and approachable staff who assist customers during pawn transactions
Transparent process with clear communication about loan terms and item conditions
Competitive and fair pricing on merchandise relative to other pawn shops
Wide variety of products including tools, jewelry, firearms, and sporting goods
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday) for customer convenience
Customers report good value and deals on diverse merchandise
Established local reputation in Oklahoma City with aggregated positive feedback
cons: Occasional delays in service, particularly with firearm transfers and return calls
Inconsistent staff attitudes and professionalism across different employees
Quality control issues reported (e.g., ammunition not checked properly)
Business verification not yet completed on directory listing
Some customers report rude or unprofessional interactions in specific instances
best_for: Customers seeking quick cash loans using personal collateral (jewelry, tools, electronics)
Bargain hunters looking for deals on used tools, jewelry, and sporting equipment
Individuals in Oklahoma City needing accessible weekend/evening pawn services
Buyers interested in firearm purchases (subject to background checks and transfers)
diagnosis: Superpawn Inc is best suited for Oklahoma City residents needing quick collateral-based loans or bargain merchandise across tools and jewelry, with competitive pricing and transparent processes. The primary caveat is inconsistent operational execution—service delays and variable staff professionalism can frustrate customers with time-sensitive or complex transactions, particularly firearms transfers.
services: Item buying (outright purchase of used merchandise)
Item selling (retail sale of pawned and consignment goods)
